headlines.title: Starmer would have blocked Mandelson over vetting failure, says Lammy
headlines.description: The prime minister says he only learned of security concerns around the ex-US ambassador earlier this week.

headlines.title: Scammers are becoming ever more sophisticated - this is what the fightback looks like
headlines.description: Scams have exploded over the last few years. Can countries and companies come together to turn the tables on the scammers?

headlines.title: Australia's most-decorated soldier vows to fight war crime charges
headlines.description: Ben Roberts-Smith has given his first statement since he was charged with five counts of the war crime of murder last week.

headlines.title: New charity to remember Queen Elizabeth 100 years since her birth

headlines.title: 'Croatia, but cheaper': The quirky holiday spots on trend for 2026
headlines.description: Montenegro and Albania are among the places rising in popularity for Britons seeking a holiday away from tourist traps.

headlines.title: Chernobyl's last wedding: The couple who married as a nuclear disaster unfolded
headlines.description: Serhiy and Iryna married 40 years ago, unaware a nuclear reactor had exploded less than 3 miles away.

headlines.title: Should you really trust health advice from an AI chatbot?
headlines.description: Abi has had very mixed results when asking a chatbot for guidance about her health issues.

headlines.title: Harry and Meghan's trip felt like a royal tour - except many Aussies weren't interested
headlines.description: The Sussexes' four-day tour of Australia appears to have fallen flat with some.

headlines.title: A literary revolution is sweeping South Korea - and being led by women
headlines.description: A quiet revolution is unfolding as women writers carve out space in the wake of an anti-feminist backlash.

headlines.title: Police treating arson attack as antisemitic hate crime
headlines.description: It comes as a man attempts to ignite a plastic bag containing containing fluid in north-west London.

headlines.title: Newspaper headlines: 'Starmer accused of Mandelson cover up' and 'Time for Strait talking'
headlines.description: Criticism of Downing Street's handling of Lord Peter Mandeslon's vetting scandal remains prominent on Sunday's front pages.

headlines.title: Grand National winner Noble Yeats dies
headlines.description: Noble Yeats, who won the Grand National as a 50-1 outsider in 2022, dies after a bout of colic.

headlines.title: At least six killed in Kyiv as gunman opens fire and takes hostages
headlines.description: The attacker, who took hostages inside a supermarket, was killed after a shoot-out with police, officials say.

headlines.title: 'The weapons were loud, but there was always music': Sudanese band play on through the war
headlines.description: One of Sudan's most popular bands, Aswat Almadina, recall being in the studio when the war broke out three years ago.

headlines.title: Rude names, railways and a mass trespass - how the Peak District became a tourist attraction
headlines.description: It became the UK's first national park 75 years ago, but has been attracting visitors for longer.

headlines.title: 'We're not teaching them to order baguettes' - languages enjoy a renaissance in schools
headlines.description: After a long decline, the number of pupils taking language GCSEs in Wales rises for two years.

headlines.title: Baby abandoned by roadside is now changing lives
headlines.description: Becky Chaplain, an occupational therapist, is now helping burns patients in West Africa.

headlines.title: 'A red kite took my mother-in-law's sausage rolls'
headlines.description: A man believes he has the answer to where a red kite got hold of the savoury snack in Banbury.

headlines.title: 'I wouldn't be here without RNLI volunteers'
headlines.description: Chris Haffenden meets one of the RNLI volunteers who saved him after he was trapped by the tide.

headlines.title: Shakespeare's 'missing' home mapped with discovery
headlines.description: A Shakespeare expert identifies the location and size of the property the playwright bought in1613.

headlines.description: Top stories, breaking news, live reporting, and follow news topics that match your interests

headlines.title: Have the Democrats found a new strategy to scare Trump?

headlines.description: Puss teams up with a fellow thieving feline and Humpty Dumpty to go on an exciting quest.

headlines.title: Wild celebrations to verge of tears -  time running out for Spurs
headlines.description: Scenes of celebration turned to bitter disappointment as Tottenham's hopes of avoiding relegation from the Premier League were dealt a devastating blow against Brighton.

headlines.title: Miettinen dies in seven-car crash during Nurburgring race featuring Verstappen

headlines.title: How Hampton's heroics bailed out Lionesses in win against Iceland
headlines.description: Goalkeeper Hannah Hampton says she just "did my job" in pulling off three crucial late saves as England held on to beat Iceland 1-0.

headlines.description: Manchester United beat Chelsea to move closer to a Champions League return and silence the growing Michael Carrick doubters.
